name: ultimath
description: Evaluate math expressions on four independent engines (multiprecision, exact decimal, IEEE-754 double, interval) and compare results to catch floating-point error.
long_description: Ultimath runs every expression through four independent numeric engines in parallel and returns all four results side by side, so disagreement between them flags numerical unreliability. Tools: evaluate (4-engine evaluation) and list_functions (catalog). Get a free API key at https://ultimath.ai.

tools.name: evaluate
tools.description: Evaluate a math expression on Ultimath's four engines.

tools.name: list_functions
tools.description: List the available functions and constants.

api_key.title: Ultimath API key
api_key.description: Your key from https://ultimath.ai (starts with utev_). Shown once at sign-up.
